behaviors.description: Review input is restricted to changed hunks/lines rather than full modified-file contents.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module handoff/wiring error between diff extraction and review-input builder (sending full file text instead of changed hunks). Required setup: wire diff parser + input-construction modules with fixture PR diffs and full-file contents, then assert outbound review payload only contains changed ranges. System was considered but rejected because this behavior is about internal scoping logic; real OS/network/subprocess is not required to expose it.
behaviors.test_description: Run the PR-processing pipeline in-process with fixture diffs for multi-file changes. Verify the generated analysis input includes only added/modified diff hunks and excludes unchanged file regions/full-file blobs.

behaviors.description: Inline comments land on the exact intended diff positions in the GitHub PR view.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: environment/external-system error in diff-position mapping against real GitHub API semantics (commit SHA, path, side/line mapping). Required setup: real PR and real inline-comment API calls, then read back posted comments/locations. Mocked clients can hide true server-side validation and mapping behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments for known target lines via the automation and then fetch PR review comments to assert path, line/side (or position), and commit context match expected diff locations.

behaviors.description: Agent finds at least one real defect in a PR containing a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: AI judgment-quality error (model misses an actual bug). Required setup: real model inference on a seeded-bug PR and assertion that at least one finding correctly identifies the known defect. Integration/System tests with stubbed model outputs would always pass and hide this failure.
behaviors.test_description: Use a curated PR fixture with a documented injected bug and run the real review model. Assert at least one returned finding correctly references the buggy change and describes the defect category.

behaviors.description: Top-level summary contains only findings that also have matching posted inline comments.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: module handoff/state-consistency error between finding collection, inline-post result tracking, and summary rendering (ghost findings in summary). Required setup: in-process wiring of finding store + inline posting adapter + summary composer with controlled responses. System was considered but rejected because the core invariant is internal consistency and can be exposed with deterministic adapter outcomes.
behaviors.test_description: Execute review flow with a fake inline-comment adapter that records successful/failed posts. Assert summary generation includes only findings with successful corresponding inline-comment records and excludes unmatched findings.

behaviors.description: End-to-end sequence (read diff -> post inline comments -> post summary) succeeds on a real PR without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: Failure mode: multi-step orchestration error across real external systems plus agentic analysis step in a full pipeline run. Required setup: real PR data retrieval, real model-driven review step, real inline posting, and real summary posting in one unattended run. System was considered but rejected because behavior text requires the full sequence including automated review generation; a non-agentic stub would not cover real pipeline breakdowns caused by model output variability.
behaviors.test_description: Run the automation end-to-end on a real test PR using production-like credentials and real model calls. Verify it autonomously completes all stages, posts inline comments, then posts a summary that reflects the run, with no manual retries/intervention.
